Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 645-3435 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LATINO HEALTH COALITION NAVIGATOR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to help clients navigate through the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) application process, including enrollment assistance, plan selection, and follow-up. 245 S Bancroft Street Suite E Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 229-0482 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALUD CONNECT OHP ASSISTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers OHP services and education, including new enrollments, renewals, scheduling dental, primary care, and mental health appointments, answering billing questions, and updating client information. Provides assistance with applying for Health-Related Social Needs (HRSN) benefits such as housing, climate support, and nutrition. Also connects clients with additional community resources. Website Yamhill, OR 97148 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (971) 301-3207 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASA LATINOS UNIDOS FAMILY EMPOWERMENT CASA LATINOS UNIDOS FAMILY EMPOWERMENT NEXT DOOR HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA OREGON LATINO HEALTH COALITION NAVIGATOR PROGRAM SALUD CONNECT OHP ASSISTER
